A

addAttributeModifier(Attribute, double, AttributeModifier.Operation) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemAttributeBuilder
Adds an attribute modifier with the specified attribute, amount, and operation.
addAttributeModifier(Attribute, double, AttributeModifier.Operation, EquipmentSlotGroup) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemAttributeBuilder
Adds an attribute modifier with detailed parameters.
addAttributeModifier(Attribute, double, EquipmentSlotGroup) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemAttributeBuilder
Adds an attribute modifier with the specified attribute, amount, and equipment slot.
addAttributeModifier(Attribute, AttributeModifier) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemAttributeBuilder
Adds an attribute modifier to the ItemStack.
addBukkitVersion() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UserAgentBuilder
Adds the Bukkit version to the User-Agent string.
addButton(int, InventoryButton) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.inventory.InventoryBuilder
Adds a button to the inventory at the specified slot.
addCustomChart(bStats.CustomChart) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.metrics.bStats
Adds a custom chart.
addCustomChart(bStats.CustomChart) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.metrics.bStats.MetricsBase
 
addEnchants(Map<Enchantment, Integer>) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
Adds a map of enchantments to the book with level restrictions enabled.
addEnchants(Map<Enchantment, Integer>, boolean) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
Adds a map of enchantments to the book.
addKeyValue(String, String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UserAgentBuilder
Adds a custom key/value pair to the User-Agent string.
addPage(String...) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WritableBookBuilder
Adds one or more pages to the writable book.
addPattern(DyeColor, PatternType) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BannerBuilder
Adds a pattern to the banner using the specified DyeColor and PatternType.
addPattern(Pattern) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BannerBuilder
Adds a pattern to the banner.
addPlaintext(String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UserAgentBuilder
Adds a plain text string to the User-Agent string.
addPluginNameAndVersion() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UserAgentBuilder
Adds the plugin name and version to the User-Agent string.
addRecipe(NamespacedKey...) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.RecipeBookBuilder
Adds one or more recipes to the knowledge book.
addServerVersion() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UserAgentBuilder
Adds the server version to the User-Agent string.
addSpigotUserId() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UserAgentBuilder
Adds the Spigot User ID to the User-Agent string, if the plugin is paid.
addStoredEnchant(Enchantment) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
Adds a stored enchantment to the book with level 1 and level restrictions enabled.
addStoredEnchant(Enchantment, int) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
Adds a stored enchantment to the book with level restrictions enabled.
addStoredEnchant(Enchantment, int, boolean) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
Adds a stored enchantment to the book.
addUsingPaidVersion() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UserAgentBuilder
Adds information whether the plugin is a paid version from SpigotMC.org.

ALL - Enum constant in enum class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.inventory.InventoryBuilder.LockMode
Prevents all interaction with the inventory, both the GUI and the player inventory.

Appends an integer field to the JSON.

appendField(String, String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.metrics.bStats.JsonObjectBuilder
Appends a string field to the JSON.
appendField(String, String[]) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.metrics.bStats.JsonObjectBuilder

B

banner() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BannerBuilder
Returns the value of the banner record component.
BannerBuilder - Record Class in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack
A utility class for building and manipulating banner ItemStacks in Minecraft.
BannerBuilder(ItemStack) - Constructor for record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BannerBuilder
Constructs a new BannerBuilder from the specified banner ItemStack.
book() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder
Returns the value of the book record component.
BookBuilder - Record Class in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack
A builder class for creating and managing various types of books in Minecraft.
BookBuilder(ItemStack) - Constructor for record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder
Creates an instance of a BookBuilder record class.
BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder - Record Class in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack
A builder class for creating and modifying enchanted books in Minecraft.
BookBuilder.RecipeBookBuilder - Record Class in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack
A builder class for creating and modifying knowledge books in Minecraft.
BookBuilder.WritableBookBuilder - Record Class in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack
A builder class for creating and modifying writable books in Minecraft.
BookBuilder.WrittenBookBuilder - Record Class in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack
A builder class for creating and modifying written books in Minecraft.

build() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BannerBuilder
Builds and returns the modified ItemStack.
build() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
Builds and returns a new ItemStack based on the current state of this EnchantedBookBuilder.
build() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.RecipeBookBuilder
Builds and returns a new ItemStack based on the current state of this RecipeBookBuilder.
build() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WritableBookBuilder
Builds and returns a new ItemStack based on the current state of this WritableBookBuilder.
build() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WrittenBookBuilder
Builds and returns a new ItemStack based on the current state of this WrittenBookBuilder.
build() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemAttributeBuilder
Builds and returns the modified ItemStack.
build() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Returns the ItemStack that this builder wraps.
build() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.metrics.bStats.JsonObjectBuilder
Builds the JSON string and invalidates this builder.
build() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UserAgentBuilder
Builds the final User-Agent string by concatenating all the parameters.

C

changePatternColor(int, DyeColor) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BannerBuilder
Changes the color of an existing pattern at the specified index.
changePatternType(int, PatternType) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BannerBuilder
Changes the type of existing pattern at the specified index.
checkEveryXHours(double) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Starts to check every X hours for updates.
checkNow() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Checks for updates now and sends the result to the console when notifyRequesters is set to true (default).
checkNow(CommandSender...) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Checks for updates now and sends the result to the given list of CommandSenders.
clearEnchants() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
Clears all stored enchantments from the enchanted book.
clearPatterns() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BannerBuilder
Removes all patterns from the banner.

Constructs a new CompassBuilder with the specified compass ItemStack.

Sets the consumer that handles the InventoryClickEvent when the button is clicked.

Retrieves the instance of the LLibrary plugin.
getInstance() - Static method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Deprecated.
As of SpigotUpdateChecker 1.4.0, more than one instance can exist at the same time. Keep track of the instances you created yourself.
getInventoryView() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.inventory.InventoryBuilder
Gets the inventory associated with this builder.
getItemAttributeBuilder() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Creates and returns an ItemAttributeBuilder for further customization of the ItemStack.
getLastCheckResult() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Returns the last successful UpdateCheckResult
getLatestVersion() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Returns the latest version string found by the UpdateChecker, or null if all checks until yet have failed.
getLatestVersion() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateCheckEvent
Returns the latest version string found by the UpdateChecker, or null if all previous checks have failed.
getLatestVersionString() - Method in interface io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.VersionSupplier
Retrieves the latest version of your plugin.
getLockMode() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.inventory.InventoryBuilder
Gets the current lock mode of the inventory.
getMaxDurability() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Gets the maximum durability of the ItemStack.
getMenuType() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.inventory.InventoryBuilder
Gets the menu type (size/layout) of the inventory.
getNameFreeVersion() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Returns the name/suffix of the free plugin version
getNamePaidVersion() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Returns the name/suffix of the paid plugin version
getNotifyPermission() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Returns the permission required to receive UpdateChecker messages on join
getNumberOfPatterns() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BannerBuilder
Retrieves the number of patterns on the banner.
getOnFail() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Gets the task that will run when/after the update check fails.
getOnSuccess() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Gets the task that will run when/after the update check succeeds.
getPage(int) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WritableBookBuilder
Retrieves the content of the specified page.
getPageCount() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WritableBookBuilder
Retrieves the total number of pages in the writable book.
getPages() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WritableBookBuilder
Retrieves the content of all pages in the writable book.

Retrieves a pattern by index.

Gets the location the compass is pointing to.

Constructs a new RecipeBookBuilder for manipulating recipe books.

Gets an array of all CommandSenders who have requested this update check.

getResult() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateCheckEvent
Gets the result of the update check, i.e., whether a new version is available or not.
getSpigotUserId() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Gets the Spigot User ID of the user who downloaded the plugin if it's a premium plugin, otherwise "%%__USER__%%"

Retrieves the level of a specific stored enchantment.
getStoredEnchants() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
Retrieves all stored enchantments for the enchanted book.
getSuccess() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateCheckEvent
Checks whether the update check attempt was successful or failed.
getSupportLink() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Returns the support link
getTitle() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.inventory.InventoryBuilder
Gets the title of the inventory.
getTitle() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WrittenBookBuilder
Retrieves the title of the written book.
getUsedVersion() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Gets the version string of the currently used plugin version
getUsedVersion() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateCheckEvent
Gets the version string of the currently used plugin version.
getWritableBookBuilder() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder
Constructs a new WritableBookBuilder for manipulating writable books.
getWrittenBookBuilder() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder
Constructs a new WrittenBookBuilder for manipulating written books.
GITHUB_RELEASE_TAG - Enum constant in enum class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateCheckSource
GitHub Releases API.
GUI - Enum constant in enum class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.inventory.InventoryBuilder.LockMode
Prevents interaction with the GUI, allowing players to interact only with their player inventory.

H

HANGAR - Enum constant in enum class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateCheckSource
Hangar API.
hasAttributeModifiers() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemAttributeBuilder
Checks if the ItemStack has any attribute modifiers.
hasAuthor() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WrittenBookBuilder
Checks whether the book has an author set.
hasAxolotlVariant() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Checks if the ItemStack with AxolotlBucketMeta contains an Axolotl.Variant.
hasColor() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Checks if the ItemStack has a color.
hasConflictingStoredEnchant(Enchantment) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
Checks if a specific stored enchantment is conflicting with any existing stored enchantment.
hasCustomModelData() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Checks if the ItemStack has custom model data.
hasDamaged() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Checks if the ItemStack has taken any damage.
hasGeneration() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WrittenBookBuilder
Checks whether the book has a generation set.

Returns a hash code value for this object.

Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder
Returns a hash code value for this object.

Returns a hash code value for this object.

Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WrittenBookBuilder
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.CompassBuilder
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemAttributeBuilder
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hasMaxDurability() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Checks if the ItemStack has a maximum durability value set.
hasPages() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WritableBookBuilder
Checks whether the writable book contains any pages.
hasPointedLocation() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.CompassBuilder
Checks if the compass has a pointed location.
hasRecipes() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.RecipeBookBuilder
Checks whether the knowledge book contains any recipes.
hasStoredEnchant(Enchantment) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder

hasStoredEnchants() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
Checks if the enchanted book has any stored enchantments.
hasTitle() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WrittenBookBuilder
Checks whether the book has a title set.

Returns whether colored console output is enabled

Returns whether OPs will be notified on join when a new version is available

Gets whether the given CommandSenders will be informed about UpdateChecker results
isOtherVersionNewer(String, String) - Static method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Checks whether one version is really newer than another according to the semantic versioning scheme, including letters.
isPointedCustomLocation() - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.CompassBuilder
Checks if the compass is tracking a custom lodestone location.

Returns whether the message "You are using the latest version of <PluginName>" will be suppressed.
isUsingLatestVersion() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Checks whether the latest found version of the plugin is being used.
isUsingPaidVersion() - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Returns whether the paid version of the plugin is installed.

Constructs an ItemBuilder with a Material and a specified amount.

Constructs an ItemBuilder with a predefined ItemStack.

Removes all modifiers applied to a specific EquipmentSlot.

setAmount(int) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Sets the amount of the ItemStack.

Sets custom attribute modifiers for the ItemStack.

Sets the author of the written book.
setAxolotlVariant(Axolotl.Variant) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Sets the Axolotl.Variant for the ItemStack if it contains AxolotlBucketMeta.
setChangelogLink(int) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets a link to your plugin's changelog generated from your plugin's SpigotMC/Polymart Resource ID
setChangelogLink(String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets a link to your plugin's changelog.
setColor(int, int, int) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Sets the color of the ItemStack using RGB values.
setColor(String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Sets the color of the ItemStack using a hex color code.
setColor(Color) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Sets the color of the ItemStack.
setColoredConsoleOutput(boolean) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets whether the used and latest version will be displayed in color in the console
setCustomModelData(int) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Sets the custom model data for the ItemStack.
setDamaged(int) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Sets the damage value of the ItemStack.
setDonationLink(String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets a link to your plugin's donation website
setDownloadLink(int) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets the download link for your plugin generated from your plugin's SpigotMC/Polymart Resource ID.
setDownloadLink(String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets the download link for your plugin.
setEnchants(Map<Enchantment, Integer>) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
Sets a map of enchantments to the book with level restrictions enabled.
setEnchants(Map<Enchantment, Integer>, boolean) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
Sets a map of enchantments to the book, replacing any existing enchantments.
setFreeDownloadLink(int) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets the download link for the free version of your plugin generated from your plugin's SpigotMC/Polymart Resource ID.
setFreeDownloadLink(String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets the download link for the free version of your plugin.
setGeneration(BookMeta.Generation) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WrittenBookBuilder
Sets the generation of the written book.
setLockMode(InventoryBuilder.LockMode) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.inventory.InventoryBuilder
Sets the lock mode of the inventory.
setMaxDurability(int) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.ItemBuilder
Sets the maximum durability of the ItemStack.
setMenuType(MenuType) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.inventory.InventoryBuilder
Sets the menu type (size/layout) of the inventory.
setNameFreeVersion(String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets the name/suffix for the free version's name.
setNamePaidVersion(String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets the name/suffix for the paid version's name.
setNotifyByPermissionOnJoin(String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets the permission needed to be informed about UpdateChecker results on join.
setNotifyOpsOnJoin(boolean) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Whether to inform OPs on join when there is a new version available.
setNotifyRequesters(boolean) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Whether CommandSenders who request an update check will be notified of the result.
setPage(int, String) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WritableBookBuilder
Sets the content of a specific page in the writable book.
setPages(String...) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WritableBookBuilder
Sets the content for all pages in the writable book, replacing existing pages.
setPages(List<String>) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.WritableBookBuilder
Sets the content for all pages in the writable book, replacing existing pages.
setPaidDownloadLink(int) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets the download link for the paid version of your plugin generated from your plugin's SpigotMC/Polymart Resource ID.
setPaidDownloadLink(String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets the download link for the paid version of your plugin.
setPattern(int, DyeColor, PatternType) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BannerBuilder
Sets a pattern at the specified index using the given DyeColor and PatternType.
setPattern(int, Pattern) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BannerBuilder
Sets a pattern at the specified index.
setPatterns(List<Pattern>) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BannerBuilder
Replaces all patterns on the banner.
setPointedLocation(Location) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.CompassBuilder
Sets the location the compass should point to.
setRecipes(List<NamespacedKey>) - Method in record class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BookBuilder.RecipeBookBuilder
Sets the list of recipes for the knowledge book, replacing any existing recipes.

Sets a link to your plugin's support channel.
setTimeout(int) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets the timeout for the HTTP (S) connection in milliseconds.
setTitle(String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.inventory.InventoryBuilder
Sets the title of the inventory.

Sets the title of the written book.
setUsedVersion(String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets the version string of the currently used plugin version.

Sets the UserAgent string using a UserAgentBuilder
setUserAgent(String) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Sets the UserAgent string using plain text
setUsingPaidVersion(boolean) - Method in class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Tells the UpdateChecker whether the server already uses the paid version of your plugin.

Updates the button at the specified slot and re-decorates the inventory.

UpdateChecker - Class in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker
This class is responsible for checking plugin updates by connecting to a specified API.
UpdateChecker(JavaPlugin, UpdateCheckSource, String) - Constructor for class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Initializes an UpdateChecker instance.
UpdateChecker(JavaPlugin, VersionSupplier) - Constructor for class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateChecker
Initializes an UpdateChecker instance with a custom VersionSupplier.
UpdateCheckEvent - Class in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker
This event is called whenever an update check is finished.
UpdateCheckEvent(UpdateCheckSuccess, UpdateChecker) - Constructor for class io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker.UpdateCheckEvent
Constructs an UpdateCheckEvent with the given success status and associated UpdateChecker.
UpdateCheckResult - Enum Class in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker
Represents whether a new version is available or not
UpdateCheckSource - Enum Class in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker
Represents the source from where to fetch update information.
UpdateCheckSuccess - Enum Class in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker
Represents the result of an update check.
UserAgentBuilder - Class in io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.updatechecker
Builds a User-Agent string for the update checker.

Constructs a UserAgentBuilder for the specified UpdateChecker instance.
